title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXXV. Relics.
content:
Shake a leg, wag a leg, when will you gang?
        At midsummer, mother, when the days are lang.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DCXXV. Relics."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
